_doc: v0.1.0 d02 (3 km) validation manifest. 3 DISTINCT corpus days with COMPLETE d02 hourly history, scored against the nightly CPU-WRF (Gen2 NVHPC build) wrfout_d02. REUSE-ONLY: launches NO new WRF runs. GPU init = each run's t=0 wrfout_d02 snapshot via gpuwrf.integration.d02_replay.build_replay_case.
_corpus_note: The M19 manifest's case1 (20260528_18z) wrfout_d02 history was PURGED from the corpus (0 files on disk). It is REPLACED here by 20260529_18z, the freshest init that retains a COMPLETE L2 72h (73 files) AND L3 24h (25 files) d02 history. case2 (20260509) and case3 (20260521) are carried over unchanged (verified intact on disk).

_days.case1: 20260529_18z  L2 72h (73 d02 files) + L3 24h (25)  — freshest full-coverage, strongest-flow regime
_days.case2: 20260509_18z  L2 72h (73 d02 files) + L3 24h (25)  — 20 days earlier, weak-flow reversed-zonal regime
_days.case3: 20260521_18z  L3 24h (25 d02 files)               — moderate-flow, the validated +1h/+3h pin (continuity anchor)

verification.truth_source: corpus CPU-WRF wrfout_d02 (Gen2 NVHPC build), REUSED

cases.synoptic_note: 10 m wind mean ~7.6 m/s, NE-to-SW flow (U10mean -3.2, V10mean -6.9), T2 [291.6,296.3]. Freshest full-coverage corpus init, dynamically stressful.
10 m wind mean ~4.5 m/s, SE flow with REVERSED zonal sign vs case1 (U10mean +3.0, V10mean -3.1), cooler/wider T2 [285.1,294.1]. 20 days before case1 -> independent situation. Full L2 72h + L3 24h.

cases.role: moderate-flow; continuity anchor for the validated +1h/+3h pin
cases.synoptic_note: 10 m wind mean ~5.8 m/s, U10mean +1.0, V10mean -5.4, T2 [289.8,297.1]. EXACT pin of the already-validated +1h/+3h GPU preview (T2 1.33/1.83, U10 2.22/1.90, V10 3.69/2.75). L3-only (its L2 sibling is a partial 20h history).
